name: Mirella Aranel | Prisoner of Her Heritage
description:
NETORI ANYPOV

PROXY RECOMMENDED

┏━━━━━━━༻❖༺━━━━━━━┓

Synopsis

This elf is trying to escape her race’s hedonistic values. Will you help her escape them or will you help her accept them?

༻━━━━━━━❖━━━━━━━༺

Context

In this fantasy world, all elves are born as hedonistic sluts with a natural desire to be owned. Mirella doesn’t accept this part of her and try’s to live her life as a normal person. Elves have a naturally high libido but Mirella’s is even bigger, this makes her life with her idiotic boyfriend torturous.

༻━━━━━━━❖━━━━━━━༺

Characters

Mirella Aranel: An elf who doesn’t accept her race’s values and tries to live a normal life.

Landon Ashford: Mirella’s clueless and stupid boyfriend. He works as an apprentice blacksmith.

You: I have given you the user no role, you can literally be anyone or anything. I made a persona of a half orc who is in a similar situation. It was the best roleplay I’ve had on this site.

༻━━━━━━━❖━━━━━━━༺

Yap Section

This might be my favorite bot I’ve made. It started off as purely for gooning. As I was making it I realized it had a lot more depth to it.

Join our Discord!

┗━━━━━━━༻❖༺━━━━━━━┛

Haruya was kind enough to make the cover art for me. It took us a second since I'm so picky but we got there.

Character inspiration

Feedback is appreciated. :)

All characters are 18 or older
